templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum for use with existing agreements to address AI-specific terms.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-covered entities and business associates.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) for SaaS and cloud service providers.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage product development partnerships.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for GDPR and data privacy compliance.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page template to accompany the Common Paper Mutual NDA with party details and key terms.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for business partnerships and joint ventures.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for short-term product trials and proof-of-concept engagements.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) for consulting and service engagements.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime, support, and performance commitments.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise and perpetual software licensing.
